zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Peavey於1665年出生在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆格林藍德時，他的父親Thomas Peavey Jr21歲，母親Martha Eaton15歲。他於大約1686年與Rachel Adams在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1720年12月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德享年55歲，埋葬在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆聶文頓聶文頓 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Peavey于1665年出生在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆格林藍德时，他的父亲Thomas Peavey Jr21岁，母亲Martha Eaton15岁。他于大约1686年与Rachel Adams在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1720年12月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德享年55岁，埋葬在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆聶文頓聶文頓 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Peavey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Scottish: unexplained. Compare   Peavy  .
History: Edward Peavey is mentioned in the records of Portsmouth, NH, in1691, as well as Abell, Nathaniel, Joseph, William, and Peter Peavey(probably his sons).

variants.name: Pevey
meanings: Scottish or English: unexplained. Compare   Peavey  .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.description: Oldest Grave seen in Memorials List

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Peavey was born in 1665, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, his father, Thomas Peavey Jr, was 21 and his mother, Martha Eaton, was 15. He married Rachel Adams about 1686, in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 19 December 1720, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 55, and was buried in Newington Cemetery, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Peavey est né en 1665, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, son père, Thomas Peavey Jr, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Martha Eaton, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Rachel Adams environ 1686, à Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 19 décembre 1720, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Newington Cemetery, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Peavey 1665 in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Peavey Jr 21 und seine Mutter Martha Eaton 15. Er hat um 1686 in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Rachel Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Peavey è nato il nel 1665 nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Thomas Peavey Jr, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Martha Eaton, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Rachel Adams circa 1686, nel Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 dicembre 1720, nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Newington Cemetery, Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Peaveyが1665年にアメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムグレエンランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Peavey Jrは21歳，母Martha Eatonは15歳であった。約1686年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムニューイントンでRachel Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1720年12月19日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムグレエンランドで55歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州ロクインガムニューイントンニューイントン セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Peavey(이)가 1665년 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 그린랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Peavey Jr(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Eaton(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1686년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴잉턴에서 Rachel Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1720년 12월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 뉴잉턴 뉴잉턴 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Peavey nasceu em 1665, em Greenland, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Thomas Peavey Jr, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Martha Eaton, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Rachel Adams aproximadamente 1686, em Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de dezembro de 1720, em Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Newington Cemetery, Newington, Rockingham, Nova Hampshire, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Peavey родился в 1665 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Thomas Peavey Jr было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Martha Eaton, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Rachel Adams около 1686 г. в местности нюингтон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 19 декабря 1720 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности нюингтон кеметири, нюингтон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Peavey nació en 1665, en Greenland, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, su papá, Thomas Peavey Jr, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Martha Eaton, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Rachel Adams aproximadamente 1686, en Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de diciembre de 1720, en Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Newington Cemetery, Newington, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos.
